sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 444 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.24 & 25. 2. For orders on CMA No.508/2022. 3. For hearing of main case. 14.01.2026 Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for the applicant. Learned counsel states that the impugned order was predicated on the plea of time bar. He states that the said finding is corroborated from the facts, circumstances and record. Under such circumstances, learned counsel does not press this reference application, which is hereby dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
